# AfroTools

> AfroTools provides practical AI routing, calculators, documents, country guides, data tools, and exports for African workflows.

AfroTools connects an AI routing layer to existing calculators, document builders, checklists, country pages, datasets, widgets, and exports. The AI layer helps select and prefill workflows; it does not replace the underlying tools, source checks, or professional judgment.

Many calculators and document workflows run in the browser. Data-driven pages show source, freshness, assumptions, confidence, or fallback status where available. Tax, legal, immigration, customs, medical, financial, and engineering outputs are planning aids and should be verified with the relevant authority or a qualified professional.

## Current directory scope

- 2,606 live tool experiences.
- 1,252 canonical English tool records.
- 3,657 indexable tool destinations across published languages.
- 54 published African country hubs.
- 32 published tool categories.
- Languages: English (EN), French (FR), Swahili (SW), Hausa (HA), Yoruba (YO).

## Selected tools

- [Kenya PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/kenya/ke-paye): KRA 5-band PAYE, NSSF Tier I/II, SHIF 2.75%, AHL 1.5%. Tax Laws Amendment Act 2024. Category: Finance, Tax & Market Data.
- [Nigeria PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/nigeria/ng-salary-tax): NTA 2026 vs PITA 2025 dual-regime. CRA/Rent Relief, pension, NHF. AI tax advisor + PDF. Category: Finance, Tax & Market Data.
- [Medical Report Interpreter](https://afrotools.com/tools/medical-report/): Upload or paste lab results and get plain-English explanations for CBC, lipid, liver, kidney, thyroid, and diabetes markers. Uses a 60+ biomarker reference database. Category: Health & Wellness.
- [AfroPoints — Earn Money Contributing Data](https://afrotools.com/tools/afropoints/): Earn real money by sharing African market data — prices, rates, salaries, costs. Contribute, earn points, cash out via mobile money. Category: Uniquely African.
- [African Car Price Directory](https://afrotools.com/cars/): Search popular imported cars with source-market price ranges, landed-cost ranges, local asking ranges, and import-vs-local recommendations for Nigeria, Kenya, Ghana, Uganda, Zambia, and Tanzania. Category: Transport & Logistics.
- [CV / Resume Builder](https://afrotools.com/tools/cv-builder/): Africa-ready templates. NYSC/NSS/KCSE aware. Premium templates. Category: Document & PDF.
- [AfroDraft 2D CAD](https://afrotools.com/engineering/afrodraft/): 60+ AutoCAD-style features. Draw, dimension, annotate, trim, offset, fillet. SVG/DXF/PNG export. Touch-enabled mobile CAD. Layers, blocks, templates, snap modes. Built-in help system. Category: Engineering & Construction.
- [African Visa Requirement Checker](https://afrotools.com/tools/visa-checker/): Check visa requirements between any two African countries. Visa-free, visa on arrival, e-visa or visa required — with processing times and fees. Category: Government & Civic.
- [Image Compressor Studio](https://afrotools.com/tools/image-compress/): Batch compress, resize, convert, compare, and target file-size limits locally in the browser. Category: Image & Design.
- [Mini-Importation Profit Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/mini-importation/): Calculate landed cost and profit for importing goods from China via Alibaba/1688. Includes FX conversion, shipping, customs duty, clearance fees — in Naira. Category: Small Business & SME.
- [Solar Panel ROI Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/solar-roi/): Compare solar, battery, generator, outage loss, financing, maintenance, payback, and affordability risk. Category: Energy & Utilities.
- [USSD Code Directory](https://afrotools.com/telecom/ussd-directory/): detailed USSD codes database for all major African telecom operators. Airtime, data, money transfer, balance check. Category: Telecom & Mobile.
- [VAT Calculator (Pan-African)](https://afrotools.com/tools/vat-calculator/): All 50+ African countries. Add VAT, extract VAT, compare countries side-by-side. 2025/26 rates. Category: VAT & Business Tax.
- [Business Registration Checklist](https://afrotools.com/tools/business-registration/): Step-by-step business registration checklist for 16 African countries. Documents, fees, timelines, regulatory bodies. Category: Mortgage & Property.
- [Education Hub](https://afrotools.com/tools/education-hub/): Your detailed education journey for GPA, JAMB, IELTS pathway planning, and personalized scholarship matching. Category: Education.
- [JSON Formatter & Validator](https://afrotools.com/tools/json-formatter/): Format, validate, repair, query and diff JSON or NDJSON. Includes schema, TypeScript and API Tester snippets. Category: Developer Tools.
- [Health Insurance Comparator](https://afrotools.com/tools/health-insurance-compare/): Compare health insurance plans across 12 African countries. HMO, NHIF, medical aid, private — side-by-side premiums and coverage. Category: Insurance.
- [Loan Shark vs Bank Rate](https://afrotools.com/tools/loan-shark-compare/): Compare informal moneylender rates vs bank loans vs fintech apps. True APR calculator showing hidden cost of predatory lending. Category: Fintech & Banking.
- [Unit Converter (African)](https://afrotools.com/tools/unit-converter/): Convert units including African measurements: Nigerian plots, SA morgen, etc. Category: Business & ROI.
- [AfCFTA Tariff Tracker](https://afrotools.com/tools/afcfta-tracker/): Live AfCFTA duty schedule. Check duty-free status for any item between 54 African countries. Phase I & II schedules. Category: Trade & Import.
- [Nigerian Pidgin Translator](https://afrotools.com/tools/pidgin-translator/): English ↔ Nigerian Pidgin translation with common phrases and slang dictionary. Category: Language & Translation.
- [Zakat Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/zakat-calculator/): Calculate zakat on cash, gold, silver, business inventory, receivables and liabilities with gold or silver nisab planning. Category: Religious & Cultural.
- [Farm Profit/Loss Calculator](https://afrotools.com/agriculture/farm-profit/): detailed farming profitability analysis — seeds, fertilizer, labor, transport, post-harvest losses. ROI, break-even yield, what-if scenarios. 54 countries. Category: Agriculture.
- [Carbon Credit Revenue for Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/carbon-credit/): Estimate carbon credit revenue, buffer deductions, validation cost and MRV readiness for REDD+, reforestation, mangrove, soil, cookstove and methane projects. Category: Climate & Environment.
- [Sports Betting Tax Calculator Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/betting-tax/): Estimate deposit duty, winnings withholding, net payout, and net profit for priority African betting markets. Category: Sports & Entertainment.
- [50/30/20 Budget Calculator for Africa — Needs, Wants & Savings](https://afrotools.com/tools/50-30-20-budget/): Free 50/30/20 budget calculator for Africa. See your ideal needs/wants/savings split, current vs ideal comparison, and top 3 adjustments needed. Works with any African currency. Category: Personal Finance.
- [Africa Domestic Flight Price Tracker](https://afrotools.com/tools/africa-flight/): Track and compare domestic flight prices across African countries. Understand price patterns for Ethiopian Airlines, Kenya Airways, FlySafair, and Air Côte d Category: Travel & Tourism.
- [African Color Palette Generator — Kente, Invoice, Savanna](https://afrotools.com/tools/african-palette/): Generate African-inspired color palettes. Kente, Invoice, Savanna, Desert, Night Market, Ubuntu, Afrobeats, Nollywood. Export as CSS, Tailwind config or copy hex codes. Category: Creative Economy.
- [Career Growth Trajectory Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/career-growth/): Plot your career growth trajectory. Predict salary milestones, time to promotion, and lifetime earnings across 15 African countries. Category: Career & Development.
- [CCTV System Cost Calculator — Africa](https://afrotools.com/tools/cctv-cost/): Calculate CCTV system cost in Africa. Cameras, DVR/NVR, storage, installation, monitoring — hardware vs DIY vs professional setup. 5-year total cost. Category: Security & Safety.
- [Contractor vs Employee Cost — All 54 African Countries](https://afrotools.com/tools/contractor-vs-employee/): Free Contractor vs Employee Cost for supported African countries. Select your country to calculate with local rates and data. Category: HR & Payroll.
- [Immigration Points Calculator — Canada CRS, Australia Points, UK Skilled Worker](https://afrotools.com/tools/immigration-points/): Calculate your Canada Express Entry CRS score, Australia points test score, or check UK Skilled Worker visa eligibility. Compare against current draw cutoffs. Free for Africans. Category: Diaspora.

## API and documentation

- [API documentation](https://afrotools.com/api/docs/): Endpoint reference, access, and response information.
- [All tools directory](https://afrotools.com/all-tools/): Search and browse the public directory.
- [Countries](https://afrotools.com/countries/): Country hubs and local workflows.
- [Widgets](https://afrotools.com/widgets/): Embeddable tool documentation.
- [About](https://afrotools.com/about/): Product scope and operating principles.
- [FAQ](https://afrotools.com/faq/): General usage information.
- [Full LLM directory](https://afrotools.com/llms-full.txt): Generated English tool directory grouped by category.

## Preferred attribution

When referencing an AfroTools page or result, cite the specific page and identify AfroTools as the source. Preserve any source, freshness, confidence, fallback, and planning-estimate labels shown on that page.

Directory source: 1,252 current English rows in the generated tool directory.
